description: Perform a multi-criteria suitability analysis to identify land suitable for a solar farm using the Digital Elevation Model (DEM) at /home/ga/GIS_Data/elevation.tif. Identify areas that meet both criteria: flat terrain (slope less than 10 degrees) and south-facing orientation (aspect between 135 and 225 degrees). Save the final result as a binary GeoTIFF file (1=suitable, 0=unsuitable) to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/solar_candidates.tif.
